Rules & Audit

DashboardApprovalsTransfersCustomersRules

System Controls

Maintenance Mode
Disable user access
Fraud Detection AI
Real-time monitoring
KYC Enforcement
Required for $10K+
Auto-Approve
Under $5K verified

Risk Thresholds

Daily Limit
$50K per customer
International Block
High-risk countries
New Device Alerts
Unrecognized login
Two-Factor Auth
Required for admin

User Role

  • Can create account and sign in as customer
  • Can view own balances, cards, transfers
  • Can initiate transfers from checking
  • Cannot approve accounts or view others
  • Cannot override holds or change rules

Admin Role

  • Can review customers, KYC, risk, approvals
  • Can monitor transfers and flag suspicious
  • Can place holds and manage statuses
  • Can see dashboards and audit controls
  • Cannot move money from admin portal

Audit Log
